book_title: SCROLL 1 — MENELIK AND THE RING OF SHEBA
verses: 1. *Teacher*: Hear the beginning of the lineage.
2. Queen SHEBA ruled all Africa, which was called ETHIOPIA.
3. Rhodesia, now Zimbabwe, was the land of her commerce.
4. The river SAVE is named from SHEBA — SHAVA.
5. SHEBA travelled to Jerusalem to test SOLOMON.
6. SOLOMON set a law: nothing is taken without asking.
8. By the law, SHEBA became his wife.
9. SOLOMON dreamed of the sun leaving Israel.
10. The sun rose over ETHIOPIA and ROME.
11. SOLOMON gave SHEBA a ring of authority.
13. MENELIK sought his father at twenty years.
14. SOLOMON hid among servants to test recognition.
15. MENELIK recognized him by spirit, not throne.
17. Conflict arose: two kings cannot rule one land.
19. The ARK of MAIKORO was given.
20. The true ARK of MARIA was taken by covenant.
21. The ARK refused to move until the priest’s finger was restored.
22. MENELIK returned to AFRICA with the ARK.
23. He ruled with light and authority.
24. He was buried with the ring at KILIMANJARO.
25. The ring awaited the appointed time.
26. In 1914, BABA JOHANI was born in the land of SHEBA.
27. The journey of the ring was revealed.
28. Prophecy moved from ISRAEL to the SOUTH.
30. *Teacher*: Thus begins the scroll of return.

book_title: SCROLL 2 — BALANCE OF LIGHT AND DARKNESS
verses: 3. Stars carry both masculine and feminine.
4. Man alone carries full electric balance.
6. Fear lowers vibration; truth raises it.
21. Africans now stand in the Leo Age.
22. The Lion carries fire and rulership.
25. Isaiah declared: God creates light and darkness.

book_title: SCROLL 3 — THE AGES AND THE LION THRONE
verses: 6. Africans move from Virgo into Leo.
7. Leo is the throne of fire.
10. The Sun governs spirit and day.
12. The Lion does not fear Saturn.
15. The woman clothed with the sun.
16. The child was taken to the throne.
20. The throne is no longer hidden.
21. Kings must rise among the people.
25. Those who guard truth are princes.
28. The Lion stands at the center.

book_title: SCROLL 4 — THE WAR IN HEAVEN AND THE BIRTH OF AUTHORITY
verses: 2. A woman clothed with the sun stood ready to give birth.
3. The moon rested beneath her feet.
5. A dragon stood before her in rage.
6. The dragon carried seven heads and ten horns.
7. Its desire was to devour the child.
8. The child was born male and strong.
9. He was taken immediately to the throne.
11. The woman fled into the wilderness.
14. The dragon fought back but failed.
15. He lost his place in heaven.
16. He was cast down to earth.
17. A voice declared salvation had come.
19. Victory came by testimony and blood.
25. The throne was no longer distant.

book_title: SCROLL 5 — SATURN, TIME, AND THE LAW OF BALANCE
verses: 1. *Teacher*: Understand time and you understand rule.
3. The Sun governs day and spirit.
4. There is no day without night.
5. There is no night without day.
6. Saturn is Cronos, keeper of time.
8. Fear is used to control time.
11. Leo is ruled by the Sun.
24. Saturn fell from heaven to earth.
